title: HEPData Validation Campaign
author: Peter Higgins / Claude

runs.name: W Boson Decay Branching Fractions
runs.physical_note: Composition set by degree-of-freedom counting (3 colours × 2 generations). FLAG correct for combinatoric system.

runs.name: Higgs Boson Branching Ratios (125 GeV)
runs.physical_note: ζ(2) = π²/6 consistent with mass²-scaled coupling hierarchy.

runs.name: Top Quark Decay W Helicity Fractions
runs.physical_note: Khinchin K governs continued fraction coefficients. Helicity partition has steep hierarchy from V-A structure.

runs.name: Tau Lepton Decay Branching Fractions
runs.physical_note: Highest mode count. Mixed leptonic/hadronic channels create structural heterogeneity.

runs.name: Z Boson Partial Decay Widths
runs.physical_note: Like W decay — composition set by counting accessible channels. FLAG correct.

runs.name: CKM Matrix Elements (initial — failed)
runs.physical_note: Guard 4 failure: max/min ratio = 4.61e+110. Dirichlet perturbation alpha too small for |Vub|² ≈ 1.5e-5.

runs.name: Cosmic Energy Budget (Planck 2018)
runs.physical_note: Euler-family 1/(e^π) — same constant found in Hs-23 combined radionuclide chain. Cross-scale resonance.

runs.name: Proton Momentum Fractions (Parton Distribution)
runs.physical_note: Parton distributions are scale-dependent (Q² running). FLAG may reflect non-intrinsic composition.

runs.name: CKM Matrix Elements (rerun — Guard 4 fix)
runs.physical_note: Lambert W omega (Ω ≈ 0.5671) — fixed point of xe^x = 1. EITT FAIL correct for 5-order-of-magnitude hierarchy.

cross_domain_findings: SM-CPL-DIS fires in 100% of successful runs — universal signature of conservation laws
FLAG separates counting-based compositions from dynamical compositions
100% bowl rate for published data — variance acceleration expected for well-measured systems
EITT failure is diagnostic for carrier hierarchy depth (≥5 orders of magnitude)
1/(e^π) cross-scale resonance: nuclear decay and cosmic energy share Euler-family constant
